commands.name: build
commands.description: Build one or more project directories

options.name: --configuration
options.description:
Build config: Debug|Release|RelWithDebInfo|MinSizeRel
Default: project.json build.default_configuration, else Debug
Path behavior:
- If no paths are provided, current directory is used if it contains project.json.
- If a provided directory has no project.json, Abel scans immediate child directories.
- You can also pass a direct path to project.json.
Registry examples:
- abel list
- abel search sdl
- abel info imgui
- abel info imgui/sdl3_renderer
Init examples:
- abel init my_app
- abel init my_module --type module
- abel init --list-templates
Add examples:
- abel add sdl3
- abel add imgui/sdl3_renderer flecs
- abel add --project ./Game sdl3_image
Module examples:
- abel module gameplay
- abel module ai --project ./Game/gameplay
- abel module ui --dir modules/ui
- abel module gameplay --partition ecs --partition systems.pathing

commands.name: check
commands.description: Run clang-tidy on C/C++ source files in a project

commands.name: format
commands.description: Format C/C++ source files in a project

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create a new Abel project from a template

commands.name: module
commands.description: Create a local module and add it as dependency

commands.name: test
commands.description: Build then run tests with ctest
